changeSet.author: lims
changeSet.comment: Seed typical adult panic limits for the seeded analytes (by parameter id).
changeSet.sql: -- FBC UPDATE test_parameters SET critical_low = 2.00, critical_high = 30.00 WHERE id = '21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111001'; -- WBC 10^9/L UPDATE test_parameters SET critical_low = 7.00, critical_high = 20.00 WHERE id = '21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111003'; -- Hemoglobin g/dL UPDATE test_parameters SET critical_low = 20.00, critical_high = 60.00 WHERE id = '21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111004'; -- Hematocrit % UPDATE test_parameters SET critical_low = 50.00, critical_high = 1000.00 WHERE id = '21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111008'; -- Platelets 10^9/L -- Glucose mg/dL UPDATE test_parameters SET critical_low = 50.00, critical_high = 400.00 WHERE id = '21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111013'; -- Urea / Creatinine (high only) UPDATE test_parameters SET critical_high = 100.00 WHERE id = '21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111020'; -- Urea mg/dL UPDATE test_parameters SET critical_high = 7.40 WHERE id = '21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111021'; -- Creatinine mg/dL -- Electrolytes mmol/L UPDATE test_parameters SET critical_low = 120.00, critical_high = 160.00 WHERE id = '21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111023'; -- Sodium UPDATE test_parameters SET critical_low = 2.80, critical_high = 6.20 WHERE id = '21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111024'; -- Potassium UPDATE test_parameters SET critical_low = 80.00, critical_high = 120.00 WHERE id = '21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111025'; -- Chloride -- LFT UPDATE test_parameters SET critical_high = 15.00 WHERE id = '21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111026'; -- Total Bilirubin mg/dL
